zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Humphrey Grey於1441年出生在英國史洛普爾朋特斯波利時，他的父親Robert Grey22歲，母親Eleonor Lowe17歲。他和Anna Fielding至少有3個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1499年12月11日在英國斯塔福爾恩維爾享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Humphrey Grey于1441年出生在英国史洛普爾朋特斯波利时，他的父亲Robert Grey22岁，母亲Eleonor Lowe17岁。他和Anna Fielding至少有3个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1499年12月11日在英国斯塔福爾恩維爾享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Humphrey Grey was born in 1441, in Pontesbury, Shropshire, England, his father, Robert Grey, was 22 and his mother, Eleonor Lowe, was 17. He had at least 3 sons and 6 daughters with Anna Fielding. He died on 11 December 1499, in Enville, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Humphrey Grey est né en 1441, à Pontesbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Grey, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Eleonor Lowe, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles avec Anna Fielding. Il est décédé le 11 décembre 1499, à Enville, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Humphrey Grey 1441 in Pontesbury, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Grey 22 und seine Mutter Eleonor Lowe 17. Er hatte mit Anna Fielding mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Dezember 1499 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Enville, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey Grey è nato il nel 1441 nel Pontesbury, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Grey, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Eleonor Lowe, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie con Anna Fielding. Morì il 11 dicembre 1499, nel Enville, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey Grey(이)가 1441년 영국 슈럽실르 폰츠버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Grey(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleonor Lowe(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Anna Fielding(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1499년 12월 11일 영국 스태퍼드실르 빌에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey Grey nasceu em 1441, em Pontesbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Grey, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Eleonor Lowe, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas com Anna Fielding. Ele faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1499, em Enville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Humphrey Grey родился в 1441 г. в местности понтесбури, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Grey было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Eleonor Lowe, 17. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей от Anna Fielding. Он умер 11 декабря 1499 г. в местности энвилл, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Humphrey Grey nació en 1441, en Pontesbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Grey, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Eleonor Lowe, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas con Anna Fielding. Murió el 11 de diciembre de 1499, en Enville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
